mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_tugo (user_id, title, contents) VALUES (#{tugo.userId}, #{tugo.title}, #{tugo.content})
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM tbl_tugo_ddabong WHERE tugo_id = #{tugoId}
SELECT user_id, title, contents, create_dt FROM tbl_tugo WHERE tugo_id = #{tugoId}
SELECT file_url, file_name FROM tbl_file WHERE file_gbn_cd = 400 AND file_ref_id = #{tugoId}
